title: Migration to Interface Version 2
text: Migration to Interface Version 2 To work with Interface Version 2, each UX widget or your custom widget must include the uxInterfaceVersion = 2 setting in the physical widget definition section of the web.ini file. Developers must ensure this setting is added when implementing a custom widget with Interface Version 2. Note that a UX or custom widget implemented with an earlier Interface version does not contain this setting. If a widget is missing this setting or has a value other than 2, it generates the following runtime error: -263 : UWEBERR_UX_INTERFACE_VERSION_MISMATCH This error is generated for each widget with a version mismatch while loading a DSP page. You can resolve the Interface version mismatch in one of the following ways: Upgrade your widget to be compatible with Interface Version 2 Update your widget to be compatible with Interface Version 2 Was this topic helpful?
